# FacebookPost

**Object**

The component for adding a Facebook post.

## Declaration

```swift
object FacebookPost
```

## Discussion

Use the `facebook_post` object to include a facebook post in an article by specifying a URL of a publicly available Facebook post.

### Example

```json
{
  "components": [
    {
      "role": "title",
      "text": "Apple Music"
    },
    {
      "role": "body",
      "text": "Lose yourself in 50 million songs."
    },
    {
      "role": "heading2",
      "text": "Facebook"
    },
    {
      "role": "facebook_post",
      "URL": "https://www.facebook.com/applemusic/posts/2678727315476302"
    }
  ]
}
```

## Social Media

- **Instagram**: The component for adding an Instagram post.
- **TikTok**: The component for adding a TikTok post.
- **Tweet**: The component for adding a Tweet that was posted to Twitter.

## Inherits From

- Component
